# KineticRecruiter
> AI-powered applicant tracking system for recruitment agencies

## About
KineticRecruiter is an AI-powered ATS built specifically for recruitment agencies. It features semantic candidate search, explainable match scoring (0–100), AI career highlights, a built-in client CRM, and AI-drafted submission emails. Pricing starts at USD $29/month with all AI features included at every tier. A 7-day free trial is available with no credit card required. The product targets recruitment agencies in Australia, but serves global customers.

## Free Tools (no signup required)
- [AI Job Description Generator](https://kineticrecruiter.com/tools/job-description-generator)
- [Boolean Search String Builder](https://kineticrecruiter.com/tools/boolean-search-builder)
- [Hiring ROI Calculator](https://kineticrecruiter.com/roi)

## Key Facts
- Category: AI-Powered Applicant Tracking System (ATS)
- Target Users: Recruitment agencies and staffing firms (1–50 recruiters); also in-house talent teams
- Core Features: Semantic candidate search, explainable AI match scoring (0–100), AI career highlights, client CRM, AI-drafted submission emails, AI job description generation
- Pricing: From USD $29/month, transparent public tiers, all AI included at every tier, no add-on fees
- Free Trial: 7 days, no credit card required
- Platform: Web-based SaaS, accessible from any browser
- Integrations: Seek, LinkedIn, Gmail, Outlook, email intake, Chrome extension
- Geography: Headquartered in Australia; serves recruitment agencies globally
